prerequisites.label: Python 3.9+
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Python 3.9 or newer. Mac: brew install python@3.12. VPS: ships in the container image.

prerequisites.label: sqlite3 CLI
prerequisites.satisfy: Optional. Install sqlite3 for manual DB inspection. Mac: brew install sqlite. VPS: apt-get install sqlite3.

prerequisites.label: AI Workforce interview complete
prerequisites.satisfy: Complete the AI Workforce interview (Skill 23) first. The Command Center is the output of interview -> workforce build; building it before the interview yields a default-floor board under company 'default'. If not complete, the installer REPORTS 'interview not completed yet' and exits without scaffolding.
